obligation_results.evidence: The two source notebooks and the NumPy merge goal remain explicit.
All six contract axes and external-mathematics precedence remain explicit.
Audit, meta-audit, rework, alternating stewardship, signoff, ledger, and filesystem coordination remain explicit.
Formal convergence is now stated exactly as iteration 7 on product_i7, after 33 findings, same-artifact signatures, and an unchanged round.
The retracted signoff and related quantizer reopenings remain concrete without collapsing distinct findings into one repeated claim.
The third-model pedagogy audit remains outside the frozen contract and leads to the bounded human recomposition charter.
The integrated product_i11 sentence restores 128 total cells, 48 executable cells, 16 embedded figures, hostile final review, and the one-model zero-waiver signoff.
The essay explicitly distinguishes the surviving product_i7 signoff and stop record from the one-model product_i11 signoff.
The closing method is framed as a bounded governance pattern, not consensus as proof.
The essay calls the project one worked example and makes no comparative superiority claim.
Convergence remains scoped to what the chosen contract measured.
The essay opens on turn.json as the concrete carrier.
The opening shows how an ordinary fluent merge could conceal conflicts and dropped derivations.
Contract, roles, ledger states, frozen fixes, and execution checks make disagreement operational.
The quantizer/signoff episode and the later recomposition regressions provide two distinct failure-and-reopening movements.
The narrative moves from formal i7 convergence through the human pedagogy reopening to i11.
The i7/i11 status boundary remains explicit and unblurred.
The method section extracts the smallest reusable engineering pattern with a single-case caveat.
The ending returns contract choice, scope, and public authorship to the human.
